summary: whichllm is a tool designed to help users find the best local large language model (LLM) that can run on their hardware by auto-detecting system specifications and ranking models from HuggingFace accordingly. It aims to provide evidence-based recommendations that consider both model performance and hardware compatibility.
use_cases: Selecting the most efficient LLM for a specific GPU setup.
Simulating different hardware configurations before purchasing new GPUs.
Running LLMs in an isolated environment without manual installations.
